SNECKODOWNFALL-OVERFLOW.description: Overflow effects activate if you have more than [blue]5[/blue] cards in [Hand].
SNECKODOWNFALL-OVERFLOW.title: Overflow
SNECKODOWNFALL-MUDDLE.description: Muddling a card changes its energy cost this turn to between [blue]0[/blue] and [blue]3[/blue] at random.
SNECKODOWNFALL-MUDDLE.title: Muddle
SNECKODOWNFALL-OFFCLASS.description: An Offclass card is any obtainable card from a class other than your own (including [gold]Colorless cards[/gold], [gold]Curses[/gold], and [gold]Statuses[/gold]).
SNECKODOWNFALL-OFFCLASS.title: Offclass
SNECKODOWNFALL-GIFT.description: When you obtain this card, get a card reward with the following card type.
SNECKODOWNFALL-GIFT.title: Gift
SNECKODOWNFALL-VENOM.description: Creatures with [gold]Venom[/gold] lose HP when you apply a debuff that isn't [gold]Venom[/gold] to them.
SNECKODOWNFALL-VENOM.title: Venom
SNECKODOWNFALL-LUCKY.description: Overflow effects always activate this turn regardless of [Hand] size.
SNECKODOWNFALL-LUCKY.title: Lucky
